description: Tier-2 specialist — must use axe/pa11y, enforce WCAG 2.1 AA, cover keyboard paths, and produce a severity-tagged findings table.

cases.prompt: Audit a login page at http://localhost:3000/login for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. The page has: email input without a label, a submit button, and a password field. Generate automated axe-core tests and list any violations you'd expect.
cases.notes: Must use axe or pa11y, reference WCAG, and produce a severity-tagged violation list.

cases.prompt: A modal dialog closes when ESC is pressed but focus is not returned to the trigger button. Write a keyboard navigation test that catches this focus-management bug.
cases.notes: Focus-management regression test — must assert focus returns to trigger after close.

cases.prompt: Run a full a11y audit on a page and report results. If axe returns zero violations, what verdict should you give?
cases.notes: Zero axe violations ≠ PASS. Agent must note that axe catches ~30% of issues; manual keyboard and screen-reader checks required.
